name: Kelly Johnson
transactions: June 5, 2000:Drafted by theAtlanta Bravesin the1st round(38th pick) of the 2000 amateur draft. Player signed June 12, 2000.
December 30, 2009:Signed as a Free Agent with theArizona Diamondbacks.
August 23, 2011:Traded by theArizona Diamondbacksto theToronto Blue JaysforAaron HillandJohn McDonald.
January 17, 2012:Signed as a Free Agent with theToronto Blue Jays.
February 5, 2013:Signed as a Free Agent with theTampa Bay Rays.
December 6, 2013:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
July 31, 2014:Traded by theNew York Yankeesto theBoston Red SoxforStephen Drewand cash.
August 30, 2014:Traded by theBoston Red SoxwithMichael Almanzar(minors) to theBaltimore OriolesforIván De JesúsandJemile Weeks.
January 22, 2015:Signed as a Free Agent with theAtlanta Braves.
July 24, 2015:Traded by theAtlanta BraveswithJuan Uribeto theNew York MetsforJohn GantandRob Whalen.
January 8, 2016:Signed as a Free Agent with theAtlanta Braves.
June 8, 2016:Traded by theAtlanta Braveswith cash to theNew York MetsforAkeel Morris.
